stories.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah in Beirut after rocket attacks, Trump claims US-brokered ceasefire halt

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body:
🚨 BREAKING NEWS: Israel conducts military strikes against Hezbollah in Beirut, Lebanon, after Hezbollah launch at least 50 rockets into northern Israel
ISRAEL: "There will not be a situation where Hezbollah attacks and its terror HQ in Beirut remain out-of-bounds!"

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: BREAKING: President Trump says he spoke with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and there will be “no troops going to Beirut.” He also says the US spoke with Hezbollah and they agreed that “all shooting will stop” and “Israel will not attack them.”

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body:
🚨BREAKING: Huge Crowds In Tehran Raise Hezbollah Flags & Chant In Favour Of Resistance
A massive statement as Iran threatens Israel in the event of strikes in Beirut.

stories.headline: Colombia heads to presidential runoff with right-wing hardliner vs leftist candidate

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: This is a good thing… “Colombia’s populist, Bukele-loving right looks likely to win power” Abelardo de la Espriella outperformed in the first round of a deeply polarised presidential election

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Pro-Trump candidate Abelardo de la Espriella will face leftist Petro ally Iván Cepeda in a June presidential runoff election that could redefine Colombia's relations with the US.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Pro-Trump candidate Abelardo de la Espriella will face leftist Petro ally Iván Cepeda in a June presidential runoff election that could redefine Colombia's relations with the US.

stories.headline: Trump tells Iran 'make a Deal' as negotiations reportedly collapse amid war concerns

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: "As I told Iran, 'It’s time, one way or another, for you to make a Deal. You’ve been doing this for 47 years, and it cannot be allowed to go on any longer!'" - President Donald J. Trump 🇺🇸

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Asked today how he feels about negotiations with Iran collapsing, Trump said, "I couldn't care less." You'd think the president of the United States would care about service members dying and millions paying more for gas because of his illegal and unconstitutional war.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The more Netanyahu prevents the war with Iran from ending, the more obvious it becomes that he convinced Trump to start it.

stories.headline: Trump lashes out at Netanyahu in heated call over Lebanon escalation risking Iran peace talks

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: "You're f****** crazy. You'd be in prison if it weren't for me. I'm saving your a***. Everybody hates you now. Everybody hates Israel because of this." That's what a U.S. official tells Axios President Trump unloaded on Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu during a heated phone call over Israel's military actions in Lebanon.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: TRUMP FUMES AT NETANYAHU IN CALL ON LEBANON — AXIOS “You’re f*cking crazy. You’d be in prison if it weren’t for me. I’m saving your ass. Everybody hates you now. Everybody hates Israel because of this.”

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Asked today how he feels about negotiations with Iran collapsing, Trump said, "I couldn't care less." You'd think the president of the United States would care about service members dying and millions paying more for gas because of his illegal and unconstitutional war.

stories.headline: Senate confirms multiple Trump judicial nominees including first 'not qualified' ABA rating

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 JUST IN: US Senate CONFIRMS Trump judicial nominee Kathleen Lane to be District Judge for the District of Montana, 52-46 LFG! Another blow to the activist judges 🔥 All Trump judicial nominees should be approved ASAP. FAST-TRACK!

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Katie Lane is the first Trump 2.0 judicial nominee to receive a NOT QUALIFIED rating from the American Bar Association. She’s never even tried a case. There are 3,000+ licensed attorneys in Montana. Pick a different one.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🚨 JUST IN: The US Senate has officially CONFIRMED Trump judicial nominee Jeffrey Kuhlman to be US District Judge for the District of Kansas, 52-46 "The nomination is confirmed." 🔥 Activist judges dealt another blow! The more Trump confirmations the better 🇺🇸

stories.headline: Elon Musk notes that even a tiny fraction of solar power could vastly exceed Earth's current economy.
stories.body: Harnessing even a millionth of the Sun’s power, which is extremely difficult, results in an economic value far more than a million times than that of Earth’s current entire economy

stories.headline: Lex Fridman shares day with Jensen Huang in Taiwan
stories.body:
I got to spend all day today with Jensen in Taiwan: talking with thousands of engineers and eating street food at a night market. Jensen is received as a rockstar in Taiwan, like it's Beatles in the 60's. It's mind-blowing and fun to watch. But most importantly, through all the interactions and all my conversations with him, he remained the same humble, kind, thoughtful, funny guy he always was, even as a kid who went to these same night markets many years ago.

Btw, we tried a crazy amount of different street food. It's legit some of the most delicious food I've ever had. I can't wait to share video of it, including a ton of our conversations and hangout. When I can pause for a moment from all the travel to edit the video, I'll post it.

Can't wait to continue talking to Jensen and engineers at Computex this week, and exploring more of Taiwan, and of course roaming the night markets for some more delicious street food.

Days like these, even more than usual, I feel like the luckiest kid in the world.

Love you all! ❤️

stories.headline: Joe Rogan shares story of UFC fighter Daniel Rodriguez's jail experience
stories.body:
Daniel Rodriguez @DRODUFC  is a top 15 @UFC welterweight.  He went to Tijuana to celebrate a big victory and wound up getting arrested for weed and spending 8 months in a Mexican jail.  The story is wild.  

https://open.spotify.com/episode/10JAK7y5qD0Dr3bt5tIBjB?si=Vqhs6IpQT1GmNxolq0dp5g

Weed is legal in California and decriminalized in Mexico, but not for visitors and crossing the border with it is a serious federal offense.  
He’s out now, and faces Uros Medic in the main event of UFC in Serbia August 1.  
The second picture is what he looked like the day he got out.  We had a great conversation and the podcast is out now on @spotify and everywhere else.

stories.headline: NewLimit raises $435M for longevity medicine human trials
stories.body:
Following breakthrough results, we’re bringing longevity medicine to human trials.

We’ve raised a $435M Series C led by @foundersfund to make it happen.

Reprogramming cell age has the potential to create more healthy years for everyone. We're closer than ever to realizing it.

stories.headline: Bernie Sanders proposes taxing AI companies' stock 50%
stories.body:
Taxing 50% of AI companies' stock to ensure that AI benefits humanity isn't radical, but let me tell you what is:

Since Trump was elected, the 7 richest men in America, all Big Tech oligarchs, became $1.15 trillion richer while 60% live paycheck to paycheck.

That's radical.

stories.headline: NewLimit prototype drug reverses human cell age, trials next year
stories.body:
Aging is arguably the root cause of most major diseases (loss of function in our cells). Four years ago, we made a bet that aging was treatable, and NewLimit was born.

NewLimit now has a prototype drug that reverses the age of some human cells (restores function they had when they were younger), and a clinical trial scheduled for next year (with more drug candidates in the pipeline).

Grateful to Founders Fund, Thrive, Greenoaks, and the rest of the investors for this latest round. @jacobkimmel and the team are just getting started.

stories.headline: Bonfires visible on SoCal beach from hotel in pajamas
stories.body: SoCal. Bonfires on the beach. From our hotel in my pajamas. We can smell the fires. So SoCal.

stories.headline: House Freedom Caucus warns deep state weaponizing FISA Section 702 against Americans
stories.body:
🚨DEEP STATE SPYING OUT OF CONTROL!

Congress keeps “tweaking” FISA, but the deep state has been weaponizing Section 702 against Americans, including:
-19,000 campaign donors
-Senators
-Journalists
-6,800 SSNs
-J6ers

This must end — REFORM FISA NOW!

#DontSpyOnMe

stories.headline: Mario Zelaya calls Ford-Carney initiative a confirmed policy-laundering scandal for wealthy investors
stories.body:
‼️ MAJOR BREAKING

The Ford-Carney initiative, is officially a policy-laundering scandal. 

They sold it as “helping first-time buyers”

It’s now confirmed; it’s helping the wealthy buy more rental properties.

The conspiracy theory, is real. 

It’s a rebate, for ALL buyers. 

1st, 2nd, 5th, 10th properties as rentals. 

Investors with $20 million dollar portfolios, qualify. 

There’s no income cap. 

No portfolio cap. 

No anti-flipping clause. 

A foreign investor buying their tenth preconstruction condo gets the same $130,000 rebate as a young couple buying their first home.

It’s a $22 Billion boondoggle that’s feeding the exact people who own the rentals, renters are trying to escape from.

THIS IS NOT A POLICY FAILURE, IT’S HELPING EXACTLY WHO THEY DESIGNED IT FOR.

stories.headline: Eugene Mallove murdered after exposing cold fusion cover-up
stories.body:
In 1989 Eugene Mallove blew the whistle on the cold fusion cover up by the DoE and MIT after anomalous excess heat was reproduced dozens of times. 

In 2004 he was found murdered in his home.
